title: Phaecasium pulchrum
taxonomy: Phaecasium pulchrum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Diapensiaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of eastern Asia. This plant is often found growing in acidic soils and shaded areas. Phaecasium pulchrum is a small, herbaceous perennial that produces white or pale yellow flowers. Within its classification, Phaecasium pulchrum is closely related to the genus Diapensia.
